name: @forwardimpact/svcmsbridge
description: Microsoft Teams bridge onto libbridge — relay messages between Teams conversations and the Kata agent team.
author: D. Olsson <hi@senzilla.io>

jobs.goal: Bridge Conversations to the Agent Team
jobs.trigger: Engineers discuss work in chat and GitHub Discussions while the agent team is reachable only from GitHub, and every new channel adapter re-solves intake, thread state, and tenant routing.
jobs.bigHire: relay conversations between the channels engineers already use and the agent team, with thread state and tenant resolution handled once.
jobs.littleHire: dispatch a facilitate session from a chat message and return the verdict to the same thread.
jobs.competesWith: manually creating GitHub issues; copy-pasting between chat and GitHub; per-channel duplication of intake skeletons; ephemeral thread state that vanishes on restart
